content.problemStatement:
#### Widgets in Django
In Django, a widget is the part of the form that renders the HTML input element — like a text box, drop-down, checkbox, etc.
Each form field uses a widget to decide how it should look on the web page.

Example:
```python
from django import forms

class MyForm(forms.Form):
    name = forms.CharField(widget=forms.TextInput())
```
Here, `TextInput()` is a widget that renders   - an HTML `` element.

#### Labels in Django
A label is the text that appears next to a form field, describing what the user should enter. You must have noticed using this some of our previous examples.

Example:
```python
class MyForm(forms.Form):
    name = forms.CharField(label="Your Name")
```
The label "Your Name" will show up next to the input box.

**If you don't set a label, Django will create one automatically based on the field name (e.g., "name" becomes "Name").**

#### Built-in Widgets in Django
Here are all the built-in widgets provided by Django (from django.forms.widgets):

| **Widget Name**           | **Renders as**                      | **Description**                          |
| --------------------- | ------------------------------- | ------------------------------------ |
| `TextInput`           | ``           | Single-line text input               |
| `Textarea`            | ``                    | Multi-line text input                |
| `NumberInput`         | ``         | Numeric input                        |
| `EmailInput`          | ``          | Email input                          |
| `URLInput`            | ``            | URL input                            |
| `PasswordInput`       | ``       | Password field (hidden text)         |
| `HiddenInput`         | ``         | Hidden field                         |
| `DateInput`           | ``           | HTML5 date picker                    |
| `DateTimeInput`       | `` | Date + time picker                   |
| `TimeInput`           | ``           | Time input                           |
| `CheckboxInput`       | ``       | Checkbox                             |
| `Select`              | ``                      | Dropdown menu (single choice)        |
| `NullBooleanSelect`   | `` (Yes/No/Unknown)     | For Boolean fields                   |
| `SelectMultiple`      | ``             | Multi-select dropdown                |
| `RadioSelect`         | List of radio buttons           | Radio buttons                        |
| `FileInput`           | ``           | File upload field                    |
| `ClearableFileInput`  | File input with "clear" option  | Used in `ImageField` and `FileField` |
| `MultipleHiddenInput` | Multiple hidden inputs          | Hidden inputs for multiple values    |
| `SplitDateTimeWidget` | Two inputs (date and time)      | Used for split date-time fields      |
| `SelectDateWidget`    | 3 dropdowns (day, month, year)  | Date selector with dropdowns         |
